# 🍔 Food Ordering System

A full-stack food ordering system built with:

- React + Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- Firebase Auth & Firestore
- Context API
- React Router

---

## 🚀 Features

- User Authentication (Login/Register)
- Product listing (Firebase)
- Cart system
- Checkout system
- Admin dashboard
- Order management
- Real-time database

---

## ⚙️ Installation

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
